channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Spike Lee's 1st trip, Michael Jordan's welcome to newcomers and more from basketball Hall of Fame
item.description: Spike Lee had a memorable first trip to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame and Michael Jordan welcomed a couple newcomers to it.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Now we know: Detroit Lions were still mad about what happened vs. Cowboys last year
item.description: Now we know for sure that the Detroit Lions were still mad about what happened vs. the Cowboys last season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Olivia Dunne reveals 'frustrating' part of social media fame while competing in NCAA gymnastics
item.description: LSU gymnastics star Olivia Dunne revealed what the "frustrating" part of social media fame as she tries to be the best in the sport she has compete in her entire life.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mets' Kodai Senga struggles with control, knocked out in 2nd inning by Dodgers in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Kodai Senga knew something was off just before he took the mound in the National League Championship Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Joe Burrow runs for a TD and the Bengals' defense carries them past the Giants, 17-7
item.description: Joe Burrow scored on a career-long 47-yard run on the opening possession, and the Cincinnati Bengals’ defense carried them to a much-needed 17-7 victory over the New York Giants.
item.dc:creator: Tom Canavan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dodgers use timely hitting to support Jack Flaherty's gem in NLCS opener vs Mets
item.description: Jack Flaherty gave the Los Angeles Dodgers seven strong innings and helepd pick up the Game 1 win over the New York Mets to start the NLCS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Larson dominates at The Roval to lead 3 Hendrick cars into next round of NASCAR playoffs
item.description: CONCORD, N.C. (AP) — When rain disrupted Kyle Larson's bid to complete both the Indianapolis 500 and the Coca-Cola 600 on the same day — leaving him unable to turn a single lap at Charlotte Motor Speedway — he returned to the track determined to put on a show.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Titans' Calvin Ridley demands more targets early in game as frustration boils over
item.description: Tennessee Titans wide receiver Calvin Ridley expressed his frustration with the lack of targets in the first half against the Indianapolis Colts on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jackson outduels Daniels and Henry runs for two TDs as Ravens beat Commanders 30-23
item.description: Lamar Jackson threw nine passes to Zay Flowers in the first half and never went to him again. Mark Andrews rebounded from a ball bouncing off his hands for an interception to catch his first touchdown pass of the season. And Derrick Henry was Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: England gets back to winning ways but interim coach Carsley says team needs a 'world class' manager
item.description: After three wins from four games as England interim coach, Lee Carsley appeared to distance himself from taking on the job full time. A 3-1 victory against Finland in the Nations League on Sunday saw England get back to winning ways after the shock 2-1 home loss to Greece.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Billy Crystal and Spike Lee take their places at the Hall of Fame as basketball superfans
item.description: Honored for his devotion to a basketball team that doesn't have a Hall of Fame history, Billy Crystal couldn't help but note the irony. The actor is being added to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame’s James F.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Zealand opens up 3-0 lead over Britain in America’s Cup final after almost crashing
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Emirates Team New Zealand avoided a crash and nailed INEOS Britannia with a penalty as it opened up a 3-0 lead in the first-to-seven wins finals of the America’s Cup on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Middle school cheerleaders burned after coach's 'punishment'
item.description: The eighth graders said they were punished for performing a cheer at a football game their coach didn't want them to do.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Washburn, NewsNation

item.title: Rising returns, but Utes fall flat against ASU, 27-19
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising was back at quarterback, but the Utes offense continued to struggle to score touchdowns in a 27-19 loss at Arizona State Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Dodgers pitcher Trevor Bauer sues accuser, says she broke settlement terms
item.description: Trevor Bauer, the former Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher and Cy Young Award winner whose career was upended by sexual assault allegations is reportedly suing his accuser for violating their settlement agreement. According to a TMZ report on Friday, the 33-year-old L.A.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Fruita Softball wins 13th straight to take home Southwestern League title
item.description: Attention Colorado high school softball teams: you do not want to see the Fruita Monument Wildcats right now.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Gerrit Cole pitched like a postseason ace Thursday night, holding the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings and sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: 22-time Grand Slam champion Rafael Nadal will retire from tennis after next month's Davis Cup finals
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Rafael Nadal is retiring from professional tennis at age 38, he announced Thursday, after winning 22 Grand Slam titles — 14 at the French Open — during an unprecedented era he shared with rivals Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI and HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah HC beats Chicago in historic opener, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was an historic day with a memorable ending. The Utah Hockey Club never trailed after getting first-period goals from Dylan Guenther and Clayton Keller and held off a late rally to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 in the season opener for both teams on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Hockey Club celebrates opening game with evening-long Delta Center plaza party
item.description: Just 172 days after it was announced Utah would be joining the National Hockey League, the Utah Hockey Club is set to play its first game in its inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Where to watch Padres vs. Dodgers NLDS Game 3
item.description: The San Diego Padres and the Los Angeles Dodgers will meet again in Game 3 of the best-of-five National League Division Series Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers pitcher robbed at California racetrack: Report
item.description: It's unclear when the incident occurred at Santa Anita Park, located 17 miles northeast of downtown Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
